name: ynab-sankey
description: Visualize YNAB budget data with interactive Sankey diagrams

scripts.sankey: npm run fetch && npm run build && npm run render
scripts.sankey:open: npm run fetch && npm run build && npm run render -- --open
scripts.sankey:open:month: node fetch-ynab.js --range=month && node build-plotly.js && node render-plotly.js --open
scripts.sankey:open:ytd: node fetch-ynab.js --range=ytd && node build-plotly.js && node render-plotly.js --open
scripts.clear-cache: rm -rf output/ynab output/plotly && mkdir -p output/ynab output/plotly output/render
